projectDescription: A cross-platform tool to preview and send PS4/PS5 PKG files to your console using direct download links, debrid services, or compressed archives.
keyFeatures: Send PKG files to PS4/PS5 via Remote Package Installer, GoldHEN Payload Server, or etaHEN DPIv2 API
Automatic proxy server to accelerate PS4 downloads over LAN
Support for RAR/7z compressed archives with parallel download and extraction
Segmented parallel download mode for maximum speed
Integration with debrid services: AllDebrid, RealDebrid, DebridLink
Support for Google Drive, Mediafire, PixelDrain, and 1Fichier
NFS server as a PKG source
publicApiSurface: FileHostBase.IsValidUrl(string URL) — detect supported file host
FileHostBase.GetDownloadInfo(string URL) — resolve direct download URL
Installer.PushRPI(string URL, Settings Config, bool Silent) — push via Remote Package Installer
Installer.PushEtaHen(string URL, Settings Config, bool Silent) — push via etaHEN API
PayloadService.SendPKGPayload(string PS4IP, string PCIP, string URL, bool Silent, bool AutoSplit)
PayloadService.TryConnectSocket(string IP, bool Retry) — connect to GoldHEN/MiraLoader payload port
Settings struct — all configuration fields (PSIP, PCIP, API keys, download options)
